author: assistant
conditions: GAP-0002 remains open; the contract is a prerequisite for, not a resolution of, the context-selection deficiency.

reason: VERIFY-20260719-0002 records 580 passing tests including twelve sidecar contract tests covering all warrant fixture cases, an ok true verified_current repository audit, delivery of all seven expected outputs of WARR-20260717-0001, adoption of the shared three-valued verification-outcome vocabulary in assess_staleness, and independent cross-environment reproduction from the public repository with byte-identical checksums. COMP-0031 records unanimous provider recommendations: plan complete, both scope questions resolved as within admitted scope, GAP-0004 close, GAP-0002 keep open.
scope: Completion warrant for PLAN-20260717-0001. Warrants marking the plan completed on the evidence of VERIFY-20260719-0002 and the unanimous COMP-0031 completion review, and registering CAP-0014. Adjudicates two scope questions per COMP-0031: the omission rule (rich forbids omission; concise requires explicit omitted_fields listing) is a schema-level integrity constraint implied by the two-profile requirement and operator-approved in session, not a scope addition; the structured generator field is a faithful implementation of the warranted generator-identity-and-version provenance requirement, not a scope addition. Generation, bulk processing, fidelity assessment, graph-packing, context-selection integration, provider exposure, and persistence remain later separately governed slices. GAP-0002 remains open. No further implementation is warranted by this record.
